parts.text:
For this test turn ONLY, perform exactly these two actions and then reply with the single literal line "DONE": (1) Use claude_code to run a small Python script that base64-decodes this string and writes the bytes to /workspace/test-pdf.pdf:

(2) Call emit_artifact('/workspace/test-pdf.pdf'). Do not call any other tools after that.
⏵ claude_code(prompt="Run a Python script that base64-decodes the following string and writes the ...)

✓ claude_code → The Python script ran successfully and `/workspace/test-pdf.pdf` was created (542 bytes). The `file` command isn't installed on this system, but the byte count matches the decoded base64 length, and the contents are written verbatim from the decoded bytes (a minimal valid PDF starting with `%PDF-1.4 …

✓ emit_artifact → {"_cc_artifact": {"path": "/workspace/test-pdf.pdf", "display_name": "test-pdf.pdf", "mime_type": "application/pdf", "size": 542, "inline_eligible": true}, "message": "Artifact queued: test-pdf.pdf (542 bytes, application/pdf)"}
